name: Si Zentner
abstract: Simon Hugh Zentner (June 13, 1917 – January 31, 2000) was an American jazz trombonist and big-band leader. Zentner was born in New York City, United States.

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Shew
about_quotes.evidence: one of the nicest guys I ever worked for was Si Zentner actually
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Shew interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 1, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: I think Si Zentner [Simon Hugh “Si” Zentner] took my place... He had Klee and some guy, Ralph Lee
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.evidence: oh yeah, Si Zentner, who, yeah, that’s right, and Kai Winding, I met all these guys.
